ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "exprior" INTEGER /* Years of prior experience */,
  "years_worked" INTEGER /* Years worked at the company */,
  "years_rank" INTEGER /* Years at current rank */,
  "market_factor" REAL /* Market factor influencing salary */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree level achieved */,
  "other_qual" INTEGER /* Other qualifications */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's position */,
  "is_male" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is male */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's field of work */,
  "years_absent" INTEGER /* Years absent from work */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Employee's date of birth */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  "last_promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the last promotion */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Employee's performance rating */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Employee's gender */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Employee's marital status */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "work_location" TEXT /* Employee's work location */,
  "job_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Employee's job satisfaction score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_market_factor FOREIGN KEY ("market_factor") REFERENCES market_factors ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the position is located */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the position */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or level of the position */,
  "salary_range_min" INTEGER /* Minimum salary range for the position */,
  "salary_range_max" INTEGER /* Maximum salary range for the position */,
  "required_experience" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the position */,
  "required_education" TEXT /* Minimum educational qualification required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "average_salary" INTEGER /* Average salary for the field */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_factors" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the factor influences salary */,
  "impact_value" REAL /* Quantitative value of the market factor's impact on salary */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the market factor applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee holding the qualification */,
  "degree_level" INTEGER /* Level of degree achieved */,
  "other_qualifications" TEXT /* Other qualifications or certifications */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution from which the qualification was obtained */,
  "year_obtained" INTEGER /* Year the qualification was obtained */,
  "qualification_type" TEXT /* Type of qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absences" (
  "absence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absence record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who is absent */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the absence */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the absence */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the absence */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the absence */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total number of days absent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the absence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absences_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
column_names: Indicates if the employee is male
Reference to the employee's field of work
Date the employee joined the company
Phone number of the emergency contact
Department where the position is located
Grade or level of the position
Minimum salary range for the position
Maximum salary range for the position
Minimum years of experience required for the position
Unique identifier for each market factor
Description of how the factor influences salary
Quantitative value of the market factor's impact on salary
Region where the market factor applies
Unique identifier for each qualification record
Reference to the employee holding the qualification
Institution from which the qualification was obtained
Unique identifier for each absence record
Reference to the employee who is absent
Name of the person who approved the absence
